stemHtml: The logon is the first step in the data link process for CPDLC. Who can initiate the LOGON?

options.a: It needs to be requested beforehand in order to be used.
options.b: From the cockpit either by the captain or copilot.
options.c: The flight crew can not request it and only the ATS unit can send a request.
options.d: Initiated either by the flight crew or automatically following a contact request from another ATS unit.
